Container.Name: HELLEDGER
Container.Overview: HELLEDGER is a self-hosted, privacy-first household finance tracker. All data stays on your server in a local SQLite database — no cloud, no subscriptions.[br][br] [b]Transactions & Accounts[/b][br] [b]Transactions[/b] — Manual income, expense, and transfer entries with category and account assignment[br] [b]Accounts[/b] — Multiple bank accounts per household with roles: Main, Fixed Costs, Variable, Savings, Separate[br] [b]Categories[/b] — Income, fixed cost, and variable expense categories with subcategories and color coding[br] [b]CSV / OFX / QFX Import[/b] — Bulk transaction import with column mapping and duplicate detection[br] [b]Global Search[/b] — Full-text search across all transactions[br][br] [b]Budget & Planning[/b][br] [b]Fixed Costs[/b] — Recurring income, expenses, and savings transfers with configurable intervals; auto-booking each month; reserve tracking[br] [b]Forecast[/b] — 12-month projection based on fixed costs with cumulative savings balance[br] [b]Savings Goals[/b] — Target amount and date, linked savings account, progress tracking[br][br] [b]Loans[/b][br] [b]Loan Management[/b] — Consumer loans and mortgages with full amortization schedules[br] [b]Extra Payments[/b] — One-time and recurring extra payments; term-shortening or payment-reduction effect[br] [b]Loan KPIs[/b] — Interest saved, months saved, current balance, payoff date; CSV export[br][br] [b]Reporting & Overview[/b][br] [b]Dashboard[/b] — Monthly KPIs, account balances by role, expense donut chart, savings goals widget[br] [b]Month View[/b] — Detailed monthly breakdown by category with KPI bar and available balance split[br] [b]Year View[/b] — Full-year category x month grid with totals[br] [b]Reports[/b] — Expense by category, stacked monthly trend chart, balance history[br][br] [b]Infrastructure[/b][br] [b]Backups[/b] — Scheduled and manual backups with configurable retention[br] [b]Admin Panel[/b] — SMTP, OIDC (Authentik, Keycloak), user management, registration control[br] [b]Multi-Household[/b] — Separate financial spaces; users can belong to multiple households[br] [b]PWA[/b] — Installable on desktop and mobile, works offline[br] [b]i18n[/b] — German (default) and English, per-user language preference[br] [b]Dark/Light Mode[/b] — Manual toggle[br][br] [b]Documentation:[/b] https://github.com/Kreuzbube88/helledger/tree/main/docs

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the HELLEDGER web interface

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID the app runs as (Unraid default: 99)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID the app runs as (Unraid default: 100)

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Required: random secret for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: DATABASE_PATH
Config.Description: Path to SQLite database file inside the container

Config.Name: BACKUP_INTERVAL_HOURS
Config.Description: Hours between automatic backups (0 to disable)
